---
title: unexported-naming
description: "Avoid leading underscores in private names."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Avoid leading underscores in private names. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
var _clientID string
```

## Good

```go
var clientID string
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only unexported-naming`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
